## Meeting Purpose

[Align on end-of-year priorities and refine AI enablement strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/hCACxoVT1GeYw3Hsjj-GbsVvNh-SQmQh?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**The Core Problem:** 90% of the revenue team lacks the business context to write effective outreach, leading to generic, ineffective messages like the "OddZero" example shared.](https://fathom.video/share/hCACxoVT1GeYw3Hsjj-GbsVvNh-SQmQh?tab=summary&timestamp=1185.0)
  - [**The Solution:** Prioritize repeatability over scalability. Focus on creating a repeatable process for a small group of "right players" (e.g., John Parker's team) to prove the model before scaling.](https://fathom.video/share/hCACxoVT1GeYw3Hsjj-GbsVvNh-SQmQh?tab=summary&timestamp=2110.0)
  - [**AI Tooling Refined:** A hybrid workflow is the most effective: use NotebookLM for synthesizing briefs and Gemini for creative outreach. Gemini alone gets confused by dense briefs; NotebookLM alone is too sterile.](https://fathom.video/share/hCACxoVT1GeYw3Hsjj-GbsVvNh-SQmQh?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
  - [**Next Steps:** Emily will share her AI tool research doc. The team will hold a 1-hour deep-dive session the week of Nov 17 to finalize the strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/hCACxoVT1GeYw3Hsjj-GbsVvNh-SQmQh?tab=summary&timestamp=1972.0)

## Topics

### The Core Problem: Lack of Business Context

  - [The primary challenge is the revenue team's lack of business context, not a tooling or scalability issue.](https://fathom.video/share/hCACxoVT1GeYw3Hsjj-GbsVvNh-SQmQh?tab=summary&timestamp=1185.0)
  - [**Goal:** Enable the team to understand customer challenges and connect them to Okta's solutions, moving from generic pitches to value-driven conversations.](https://fathom.video/share/hCACxoVT1GeYw3Hsjj-GbsVvNh-SQmQh?tab=summary&timestamp=1185.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Repeatability must precede scalability. A repeatable process must be proven with a small group before scaling to 300+ SDRs and AEs.](https://fathom.video/share/hCACxoVT1GeYw3Hsjj-GbsVvNh-SQmQh?tab=summary&timestamp=1319.0)

### The Solution: A Repeatable Process

  - [The strategy is to build a repeatable process for a small group of "right players" who are motivated to use it.](https://fathom.video/share/hCACxoVT1GeYw3Hsjj-GbsVvNh-SQmQh?tab=summary&timestamp=2113.0)
  - [**Initial Target:** John Parker's enterprise sales team.](https://fathom.video/share/hCACxoVT1GeYw3Hsjj-GbsVvNh-SQmQh?tab=summary&timestamp=2113.0)
      - [**Why:** Parker is a senior leader who understands pipe gen and is frustrated with the SDR org's current performance.](https://fathom.video/share/hCACxoVT1GeYw3Hsjj-GbsVvNh-SQmQh?tab=summary&timestamp=2113.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/hCACxoVT1GeYw3Hsjj-GbsVvNh-SQmQh?tab=summary&timestamp=2113.0)
    1.  [Rachael's guide in Clay identifies target accounts (e.g., retail with login boxes).](https://fathom.video/share/hCACxoVT1GeYw3Hsjj-GbsVvNh-SQmQh?tab=summary&timestamp=1375.0)
    2.  [The team selects accounts from this list.](https://fathom.video/share/hCACxoVT1GeYw3Hsjj-GbsVvNh-SQmQh?tab=summary&timestamp=1375.0)
    3.  [GrowthX enriches data in Clay and builds detailed account briefs.](https://fathom.video/share/hCACxoVT1GeYw3Hsjj-GbsVvNh-SQmQh?tab=summary&timestamp=1375.0)
    4.  [Parker's team uses the briefs for outreach.](https://fathom.video/share/hCACxoVT1GeYw3Hsjj-GbsVvNh-SQmQh?tab=summary&timestamp=2110.0)

### AI Tooling Refinement

  - [Emily's research compared NotebookLM and Gemini for prospecting.](https://fathom.video/share/hCACxoVT1GeYw3Hsjj-GbsVvNh-SQmQh?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
  - [**Findings:**](https://fathom.video/share/hCACxoVT1GeYw3Hsjj-GbsVvNh-SQmQh?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
      - [**NotebookLM:** Excels at synthesizing briefs but creates sterile outreach.](https://fathom.video/share/hCACxoVT1GeYw3Hsjj-GbsVvNh-SQmQh?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
      - [**Gemini:** Struggles with dense briefs, getting confused by the volume of information.](https://fathom.video/share/hCACxoVT1GeYw3Hsjj-GbsVvNh-SQmQh?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [**Hybrid Workflow:** The most effective method is using NotebookLM to create a "how to break in" framework, then feeding that context into Gemini to generate creative outreach sequences.](https://fathom.video/share/hCACxoVT1GeYw3Hsjj-GbsVvNh-SQmQh?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This workflow combines NotebookLM's RAG capabilities (for factual retrieval) with Gemini's creative synthesis.](https://fathom.video/share/hCACxoVT1GeYw3Hsjj-GbsVvNh-SQmQh?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [**Next Step:** GrowthX will experiment with a threaded conversation in Gemini to see if it can replicate the hybrid workflow's success in a single tool.](https://fathom.video/share/hCACxoVT1GeYw3Hsjj-GbsVvNh-SQmQh?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Market Intel & Tooling

  - [**Common Room:** Kyle's contacts (Marcel from Airbyte, Mario) expressed general pessimism about the tool.](https://fathom.video/share/hCACxoVT1GeYw3Hsjj-GbsVvNh-SQmQh?tab=summary&timestamp=2392.0)
  - [**Adobe Journey Optimizer:** Rachael is skeptical after a demo where the vendor couldn't explain its "signals."](https://fathom.video/share/hCACxoVT1GeYw3Hsjj-GbsVvNh-SQmQh?tab=summary&timestamp=2426.0)
      - [**Why:** It appears to be a repackaged version of existing tools like Sixth Sense.](https://fathom.video/share/hCACxoVT1GeYw3Hsjj-GbsVvNh-SQmQh?tab=summary&timestamp=2481.0)
      - [**Action:** Kyle will seek feedback from his network on its effectiveness.](https://fathom.video/share/hCACxoVT1GeYw3Hsjj-GbsVvNh-SQmQh?tab=summary&timestamp=2426.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Emily:** Share the AI tool research document with Kyle and Sydney.](https://fathom.video/share/hCACxoVT1GeYw3Hsjj-GbsVvNh-SQmQh?tab=summary&timestamp=894.0)
  - [**Rachael:** Consolidate thoughts and game plan with Emily during their trip.](https://fathom.video/share/hCACxoVT1GeYw3Hsjj-GbsVvNh-SQmQh?tab=summary&timestamp=2340.0)
  - [**Kyle:** Seek feedback on Adobe Journey Optimizer from his network.](https://fathom.video/share/hCACxoVT1GeYw3Hsjj-GbsVvNh-SQmQh?tab=summary&timestamp=2426.0)
  - [**All:** Schedule a 1-hour deep-dive session for the week of November 17 to finalize the strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/hCACxoVT1GeYw3Hsjj-GbsVvNh-SQmQh?tab=summary&timestamp=1972.0)
